instructions: ✅ Select the correct option (A, B, C, or D).
✅ Each question has only ONE correct answer.
✅ This quiz covers HTML introduction, tags, attributes, formatting, links, images, lists, tables, and forms.
✅ Try without seeing answers first, then verify using the answer field.

questions.question: What does HTML stand for?
questions.details: HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language. It is used to create web pages.

questions.question: HTML is used to create ______.
questions.details: HTML defines the structure of web pages.

questions.question: Which tag is used to define the main structure of an HTML document?
questions.details: The <html> tag is the root element of an HTML document.

questions.question: Which tag contains meta information and title of the page?
questions.details: The <head> section contains metadata, title, links to CSS, scripts, etc.

questions.question: Which tag is used to display visible content on a webpage?
questions.details: All visible content is written inside the <body> tag.

questions.question: Which tag is used to display the title in the browser tab?
questions.details: <title> text appears in the browser tab and search results.

questions.question: Which tag is used for the largest heading?
questions.details: <h1> is the largest heading tag in HTML.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create a paragraph?
questions.details: is used to define paragraphs in HTML.

questions.question: Which tag is used to insert a line break?
questions.details: is an empty tag used to break the line.

questions.question: Which tag is used to draw a horizontal line?
questions.details: <hr> creates a horizontal rule line.

questions.question: Which tag is used to make text bold?
questions.details: <b> makes text bold visually, while <strong> also adds semantic importance.

questions.question: Which tag is used to make text italic?
questions.details: <i> is visual italic and <em> emphasizes text semantically.

questions.question: Which tag is used to underline text?
questions.details: <u> underlines the text.

questions.question: Which HTML tag is used to create a hyperlink?
questions.details: <a> (anchor) tag is used to create links.

questions.question: Which attribute is used to specify the link address in <a> tag?
questions.details: href attribute contains the destination URL.

questions.question: Which attribute opens the link in a new tab?
questions.details: target="_blank" opens link in a new browser tab.

questions.question: Which tag is used to add an image in HTML?
questions.details: tag is used to display images.

questions.question: Which attribute is used to specify image path?
questions.details: src attribute stores the image file path or URL.

questions.question: Why is the alt attribute important in ?

options.C: It shows text if image cannot load and helps accessibility

questions.details: alt text is used for accessibility and appears when image fails to load.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create an unordered list?
questions.details: <ul> creates a bullet list.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create an ordered list?
questions.details: <ol> creates a numbered list.

questions.question: Which tag is used to define list items?
questions.details: <li> is used inside <ul> or <ol> to create items.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create a table in HTML?
questions.details: <table> tag is used to create tables.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create a row in a table?
questions.details: <tr> defines a table row.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create a cell in a table?
questions.details: <td> is a table data cell.

questions.question: Which tag is used for table header cells?
questions.details: <th> creates a header cell and makes text bold by default.

questions.question: Which tag is used to create a form in HTML?
questions.details: <form> contains input elements and is used to collect user data.

questions.question: Which tag is used to take user input?
questions.details: <input> tag is used for multiple types of user inputs.

questions.question: Which input type is used for password field?
questions.details: Password type hides typed characters.

questions.question: Which input type is used for selecting one option from multiple options?
questions.details: Radio buttons allow selecting only one option in a group.

questions.question: Which input type is used for selecting multiple options?
questions.details: Checkbox allows multiple selections.

questions.question: Which tag is used for a dropdown list?
questions.details: <select> creates dropdown and <option> adds items.

questions.question: Which tag defines an option inside a dropdown?
questions.details: <option> defines a selectable item inside <select>.

questions.question: Which tag is used to write long multi-line text input?
questions.details: <textarea> is used for long text inputs like comments.

questions.question: Which tag is used to group form elements with a border?
questions.details: <fieldset> groups form controls and can show a border.

questions.question: Which tag is used to add a caption to a fieldset?
questions.details: <legend> gives a title to <fieldset>.

questions.question: Which attribute is used to provide extra information when hovering over an element?
questions.details: title attribute shows tooltip on hover.

questions.question: Which tag is used to play audio in HTML5?
questions.details: <audio> tag is used for playing audio files.

questions.question: Which tag is used to play video in HTML5?
questions.details: <video> tag is used for embedding videos.

questions.question: Which HTML tag is used to create a clickable button?
questions.details: <button> creates a clickable button element in HTML.
